chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.S-103 of 2023 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For hearing of MA 3580/2023, 2. For hearing of main case. 23.09.2024. Mr. Mustafa Safvi, advocate for petitioner Mr. Mujtaba Sohail Raja, advocate for respondent = Learned counsel for petitioner after arguing the case at some length when failed to satisfy the court about maintainability of this petition states that if six months’ time is granted to the petitioner to vacate the premises viz. Shop No.3, Ground floor, Court chambers building, Dandia Bazar, opposite City Court, Karachi, he would not press this petition. Learned counsel for landlord/respondent has graciously acceded to this proposal. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. The petitioner can retain the demised premises for six months from today subject to payment of rent and all other dues. However, on expiry of six months or before that, he shall vacate the premises without further notice. On his failure, the executing court shall issue writ of possession with police aid without a further notice. The petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application in the above terms. JUDGE A.K
